잠언 28:1.content: The wicked flee when no one pursues; but the righteous are as bold as a lion.

잠언 28:2.content: In rebellion, a land has many rulers, but order is maintained by a man of understanding and knowledge.

잠언 28:3.content: A needy man who oppresses the poor is like a driving rain which leaves no crops.

잠언 28:4.content: Those who forsake the law praise the wicked; but those who keep the law contend with them.

잠언 28:5.content: Evil men don’t understand justice; but those who seek Yahweh understand it fully.

잠언 28:6.content: Better is the poor who walks in his integrity, than he who is perverse in his ways, and he is rich.

잠언 28:7.content: Whoever keeps the law is a wise son; but he who is a companion of gluttons shames his father.

잠언 28:8.content: He who increases his wealth by excessive interest gathers it for one who has pity on the poor.

잠언 28:9.content: He who turns away his ear from hearing the law, even his prayer is an abomination.

잠언 28:10.content: Whoever causes the upright to go astray in an evil way, he will fall into his own trap; but the blameless will inherit good.

잠언 28:11.content: The rich man is wise in his own eyes; but the poor who has understanding sees through him.

잠언 28:12.content: When the righteous triumph, there is great glory; but when the wicked rise, men hide themselves.

잠언 28:13.content: He who conceals his sins doesn’t prosper, but whoever confesses and renounces them finds mercy.

잠언 28:14.content: Blessed is the man who always fears; but one who hardens his heart falls into trouble.

잠언 28:15.content: As a roaring lion or a charging bear, so is a wicked ruler over helpless people.

잠언 28:16.content: A tyrannical ruler lacks judgment. One who hates ill-gotten gain will have long days.

잠언 28:17.content: A man who is tormented by life blood will be a fugitive until death; no one will support him.

잠언 28:18.content: Whoever walks blamelessly is kept safe; but one with perverse ways will fall suddenly.

잠언 28:19.content: One who works his land will have an abundance of food; but one who chases fantasies will have his fill of poverty.

잠언 28:20.content: A faithful man is rich with blessings; but one who is eager to be rich will not go unpunished.

잠언 28:21.content: To show partiality is not good; yet a man will do wrong for a piece of bread.

잠언 28:22.content: A stingy man hurries after riches, and doesn’t know that poverty waits for him.

잠언 28:23.content: One who rebukes a man will afterward find more favor than one who flatters with the tongue.

잠언 28:24.content: Whoever robs his father or his mother and says, “It’s not wrong,” is a partner with a destroyer.

잠언 28:25.content: One who is greedy stirs up strife; but one who trusts in Yahweh will prosper.

잠언 28:26.content: One who trusts in himself is a fool; but one who walks in wisdom is kept safe.

잠언 28:27.content: One who gives to the poor has no lack; but one who closes his eyes will have many curses.

잠언 28:28.content: When the wicked rise, men hide themselves; but when they perish, the righteous thrive.
